articles.title: Stalled Mideast peace process sends oil soaring, tech buoys stocks
articles.content: After wavering at the open, two of Wall Street's three main stock indices set fresh record highs, before paring those gains slightly before the close. "There is no concrete progress in Middle East negotiations . but investors appear broadly optimistic that a longer-term resolution will be reached," said Susannah Streeter, chief investment strategist at Wealth Club

articles.title: 'They finally approved my application': Woman marries inmate fiance at Tanah Merah Prison School 9 years after his arrest
articles.content: Despite having six marriage applications rejected over four years, Nurashikin Husni Thamrin never gave up on marrying the man she loved, Berita Harian reported. Just two weeks before their big day in 2017, Nurashikin said her fiance was arrested. He was arrested again in 2017. For the second case, he reportedly received a reduced sentence of 14 years. Nurashikin had been applying to the Singapore Prison Service (SPS) for permission to marry Farez since 2020. However, her requests were repeatedly denied until 2024. “I tried everything, including writing to the...
